name: Lviv (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic azure of medieval Galicia

description: A square blue field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of the city of Lviv — a golden lion passant within a city gate with three towers.
history: Lviv is the largest city in western Ukraine and the historic capital of Galicia. Its coat of arms, in continuous heraldic use since the 14th century, depicts a golden lion passant within the silhouette of a city gate flanked by three towers — symbolising the medieval fortifications of the city.

features.role: arms of Lviv — golden lion within a three-towered gate
features.symbolism: the heraldic golden lion of Galicia within the medieval city walls
